comment.body:
uh, it is tough, bcs it literally takes time to train your mental.
maybe you should make with lower amount.
imagine the $ amount of your trades like the weight in a gym.
if you put too much weights at first, you will not be able to see progress. 
the bigger the $ amount of your trade, the stronger the emotional involvement/connection to that.

...or automate it

comment.body:
Aight, guys, here we go again… Alma posted a simple trade, and you’re all freaking out like it’s some uncrackable coded message. She wrote  upside seems capped for now anyway and she’s counting on a pullback due to the admin’s BS, which will be a BTD opportunity. She also said that since the market is riding at all-time highs and HFs tend to take profit, you could see some weakness or mean-reverting tendencies. And that’s what she’s hedging for now. A 30-delta vs. 10-delta put spread for August is relatively cheap. A 25-delta OTM put with a July 11 expiration is also cheap, and she did say she’s not going full size because she lacks conviction..but the trend is definitely stretched.
Seriously, guys, if this level of help ain’t enough for you, you shouldn’t be trading options. Stick to stocks and learn about non-linear derivatives, because it’s getting boring that anytime when Alma posts a signal the chat obsessively discusses that signal for a month then one of you who loses on the trade goes to X and starts trash-talking Alma and lying about her trades and performance
